zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy於1152年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆內斯爾時，他的父親Raoul de Nesle II45歲，母親Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres23歲。他和Yolande de Joinville至少有1個兒子。他去世於1237年1月11日在他的家鄉享年85歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪艾斯隆朋特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nesle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nestel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Wolfram.  Jewish Aron, Hyman.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a ribbon and cord maker, from Middle High German nestel ‘(shoe)lace, drawstring, cord’.

nameMeanings.name: Raoul
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy was born in 1152, in Nesle, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Raoul de Nesle II, was 45 and his mother, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, was 23. He had at least 1 son with Yolande de Joinville. He died on 11 January 1237, in his hometown, at the age of 85, and was buried in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France.

fr.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy est né en 1152, à Nesle, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Raoul de Nesle II, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Yolande de Joinville. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1237, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, France.

de.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy 1152 in Nesle, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul de Nesle II 45 und seine Mutter Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres 23. Er hatte mit Yolande de Joinville mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 11. Januar 1237 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy è nato il nel 1152 nel Nesle, Somme, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul de Nesle II, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Yolande de Joinville. Morì il 11 gennaio 1237, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvyが1152年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメネスルで生まれた時，父Raoul de Nesle IIは45歳，母Gertrude de Lorraine de flandresは23歳であった。彼はYolande de Joinvilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1237年1月11日に故郷で85歳で死去し，フランスピカーディエイスンロングプオントにて埋葬された。

ko.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 산서르
ko.lifeSummary: Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy(이)가 1152년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 솜 네슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul de Nesle II(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Yolande de Joinville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1237년 1월 11일 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 론그폰트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy nasceu em 1152, em Nesle, Somme, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Raoul de Nesle II, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Yolande de Joinville. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1237, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, França.

ru.Sancerre, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Kin: сансирр, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy родился в 1152 г. в местности несл, сомм, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul de Nesle II было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Lorraine de flandres, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Yolande de Joinville. Он умер 11 января 1237 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности лонгпонт, эисн, пикарди, Франция.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Yolande de Joinville. Murió el 11 de enero de 1237, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Longpont, Aisne, Picardie, Francia.
